variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Current financing-related liability shown under current liabilities; best match for short-term debt excluding leases.

candidates.row_label: Loan from shareholder OKEA Holdings Ltd
candidates.why: Looks like a current loan and could be debt, but may be a component of other current payables/borrowings and is less consistently presented.
Current debt-like item but explicitly a lease liability, which should be excluded from baseline STD.
Accrued interest is not principal debt and should not be included in STD.
Operating liability, not short-term debt.

variables.notes: No clean total current borrowings/current portion of long-term debt line is reported. Chose the clearest non-lease current interest-bearing debt line. Manual review recommended because 'Loan from shareholder OKEA Holdings Ltd' may also represent current debt in some years, but including both could risk double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact reported current tax payable line.

candidates.why: For this IFRS upstream energy company, this is the main tangible fixed-asset line and the best proxy for net PPE.
Tangible fixed assets but only a minor component, not the total PPE.
Would be PPE if populated, but appears unused/zero here.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross asset, not preferred for baseline PPEGT and not a total.
Intangible asset, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - Other - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Intangible contra-asset, not PPE.
Intangible asset, not PPE.
Cash flow capex line for intangibles, not balance-sheet PPE.
